incumbentAnchor: OEM-led turnkey (Fluence / Tesla Megapack / Sungrow PowerTitan / Wärtsilä)

needs.statement: Minimize interface ambiguity between EPC contract scopes causing site delays
needs.recalibrationNote: Incumbent OEM-turnkey wraps as single counterparty but equipment-locked — partial mitigation.

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of missing FGW TR3/TR8 dossier elements blocking DSO acceptance
needs.recalibrationNote: Fluence uses local subcontractor for DE cert; OEM incumbents have no DE-cert edge — hold.

needs.statement: Minimize commissioning-recovery delays after a failed DSO acceptance test
needs.recalibrationNote: No incumbent profile addresses DSO-test-failure recovery specifically — hold.

needs.statement: Minimize change-order opacity under single-vendor OEM equipment lock-in
needs.recalibrationNote: OEM incumbent weakness; incumbent sat lowered.

needs.statement: Minimize multi-vendor warranty-chase time across battery / PCS / grid / civil
needs.recalibrationNote: OEM turnkey mitigates partially (single counterparty) — raised.

needs.statement: Minimize SLA-evidence gap from BMS telemetry for availability and throughput reporting
needs.recalibrationNote: OEM-native BMS telemetry better than arm's-length integrator — raised.

needs.statement: Minimize propagating thermal-runaway in an LFP cell triggering Feuerwehr-attended container write-off
needs.recalibrationNote: Tesla/Sungrow factory-tested propagation containment lifts incumbent sat.

needs.statement: Minimize NOVEC 1230 / aerosol false-discharge causing unplanned container decommissioning
Minimize Brandschutzkonzept rework from >3 MWh cluster separation walls missed in first Feuerwehr review
needs.recalibrationNote: No incumbent profile has DE Feuerwehr-specific edge — hold.

needs.statement: Minimize LFP container footprint (40-80 m2/MWh) disqualifying otherwise viable sites
Minimize LFP-cell single-country tariff / CRMA exposure exceeding 70% of project CAPEX
Minimize time to re-qualify an alternate LFP cell supplier (FAT, UN38.3, IEC 62619) after disruption
needs.recalibrationNote: OEM vertical integration is a weakness here (single-source lock) — hold.

needs.statement: Minimize LFP capacity derating reducing dispatch revenue at ambient <-10 C or >+40 C beyond HVAC
Minimize HVAC parasitic load exceeding 3% of throughput across the annual temperature envelope
Minimize likelihood AC-AC RTE falls below 85% on a 10-year degradation curve
needs.recalibrationNote: OEM native PCS-BMS integration tighter — raised.

needs.statement: Minimize LFP capacity fade (SoH <80% before Year 10) shortening revenue life vs. PPA term
needs.recalibrationNote: OEM deeper BMS cycle mgmt — raised.

needs.statement: Minimize installed EUR/kWh exceeding the 250-400 band that gates the arbitrage / peak-shaving case
needs.recalibrationNote: OEM scale economics on cell + container — raised.

needs.statement: Minimize LFP cell-price volatility (+/-20% YoY) invalidating the EPC offer between FID and procurement lock
